style_name: Electric Blue Silhouette Product Launch Style
style_summary: A sparse premium consumer-tech launch poster style built from black negative space, a centered product silhouette, electric-blue rim lighting, a glowing horizontal platform, soft reflection, giant cropped blue background typography, and clean white announcement copy.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main product, object, or technology category
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: how the object is staged or presented
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: specific object, product, or prop shape
environment_variables.LOCATION: minimal stage, tabletop, or void-like setting
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: secondary atmospheric details and background type behavior
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: main headline or giant background word
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small launch copy or supporting text
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: tiny status light, separator, or minimal decorative mark
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: styling direction for any visible human or tactile element
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source content that generated samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: Nearly black upper field with large areas of empty space.
Single product hero centered on the vertical axis or slightly below center.
Product remains mostly black, readable through electric-blue rim light and one tiny white status highlight.
Strong horizontal electric-blue platform or horizon line divides stage and foreground.
Blue glow spreads across the floor with a soft reflection or shadow directly under the product.
Giant cropped blue sans-serif background word sits behind the product and is partially hidden by it.
Bottom launch typography uses clean white geometric sans-serif text with strong scale contrast.
Color palette stays almost entirely black, navy, electric blue, and white.
Lighting is low-key, cool, glossy, and atmospheric, with no warm commercial accents.
Composition remains sparse, symmetrical, and teaser-like rather than crowded with feature labels.
Edges are soft and cinematic, with mild bloom and haze around the blue light.
The image feels like a premium consumer-electronics product announcement.
source_content_to_avoid: Redmi, AirDots, Pro, or any real product name, logo, brand mark, watermark, carousel overlay, or platform UI.
Wireless earbuds, an earbud charging case, or the exact black rounded case silhouette from the reference.
The exact large background word, original Chinese headline, original date/time line, and original launch copy.
Top-right brand placement copied from the reference.
The same object scale, same product shape, same status light placement, or same announcement wording.
Any Xiaohongshu, social-app controls, page counter, arrows, dots, QR codes, usernames, or creator marks.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: minimal dark consumer-electronics launch poster, blue silhouette product teaser, premium social product announcement
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A single hero object sits in front of a giant cropped blue background word on a black stage. A bright blue horizontal light plane creates the tabletop, reflection, and visual anchor while sparse white text sits below.
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: Main product occupies about 18 to 32 percent of the frame, centered and mostly silhouetted, with reflection extending downward into the blue foreground.
visual_deconstruction.camera_perspective: Straight-on low-to-mid product view with slight heroic scale and no busy environmental depth.
visual_deconstruction.typography_behavior: Huge background word in blue, cropped by frame edges and partially hidden by the product; clean white geometric sans-serif launch copy below with strong scale contrast.
visual_deconstruction.color_palette_behavior: Dominantly black and navy with electric-blue glow and white text. No warm accent palette; the only tiny accent may be a white status light.
visual_deconstruction.graphic_elements: Giant cropped word, horizontal blue light plane, soft reflection, tiny status dot, simple lower text stack.
visual_deconstruction.texture_finish: Glossy consumer-tech surface treatment, dark plastic or glass, soft bloom, subtle haze, smooth gradient falloff.
visual_deconstruction.lighting: Low-key black stage with blue rim light from the floor and sides, bright horizontal cyan-blue edge, soft reflection and deep shadows.
visual_deconstruction.mood: Quiet, premium, suspenseful, product-launch teaser with strong cool-light atmosphere.

composition.negative_space: large black upper field and uncluttered side margins
composition.product_scale: single centered product hero, usually 18-32 percent of frame area
composition.type_layering: giant cropped blue word behind product; white launch text below or along lower edge
composition.stage_system: electric-blue horizontal platform line with foreground glow and reflection

aspect_ratio_rules.9:16: vertical social poster with black top space, huge cropped blue word behind the object, centered silhouette on the blue platform, main white headline in the lower third, small support line near the bottom
aspect_ratio_rules.16:9: wide launch banner with the same centered silhouette and blue horizon line, giant cropped word stretched across the background, compact white launch copy along the lower center or lower corners

typography.background_headline: huge geometric sans-serif, blue gradient, cropped by the frame, partially hidden behind the product
typography.main_copy: clean white geometric sans-serif, large and centered or lower aligned, simple product-launch wording
typography.secondary_copy: small white or pale blue-gray sans-serif, widely spaced and minimal
typography.text_usage: Use invented generic launch text only. Avoid real brands, source names, source Chinese headline, source date, and the exact word Pro.
typography.legibility: Primary white copy should be readable; the giant blue background word may be partly cropped and atmospheric.

color_palette.proportions: 70 percent black, 25 percent electric-blue glow and background type, 5 percent white typography and highlight

image_treatment.rendering_mode: cinematic product-render look with premium consumer-electronics materials
image_treatment.surface_quality: mostly hidden glossy plastic, glass, metal, rubber, or fabric edges revealed through blue rim lighting
image_treatment.post_processing: soft blue bloom, subtle haze, deep contrast, reflection on glowing floor, smooth gradient falloff
image_treatment.texture: clean digital finish with faint noise, no paper grain, no halftone, no handmade marks

design_rules: Keep the scene sparse and centered around one product silhouette.
Use the blue horizontal platform as the strongest structural light source.
Let the product stay mostly black, with only edges and a tiny highlight visible.
Make the giant background word blue, oversized, cropped, and secondary to the product.
Use lower white type as simple launch copy, not feature-card UI.
Change product category, text, brand identity, and silhouette in every sample.
Do not add app overlays, watermarks, badges, price stickers, or many objects.
do: Preserve black negative space, electric-blue glow, and silhouette-first product treatment.
Use a single centered brandless product with cool rim light and floor reflection.
Use big blue cropped typography behind the product.
Use clean white launch copy in the lower section.
Keep the mood minimal, premium, and suspenseful.
Use consumer-tech objects that are not wireless earbuds or charging cases.
avoid: Do not show Redmi, AirDots, Pro, real logos, app UI, watermarks, usernames, QR codes, or carousel controls.
Do not generate wireless earbuds or an earbud charging case.
Do not copy the source Chinese headline, source date, launch copy, or top-right brand placement.
Do not add feature-card clutter, price stickers, warm badges, lifestyle backgrounds, or many objects.
Do not turn the style into a bright ecommerce product photo, flat vector poster, or comic illustration.
Do not overexpose the product; the silhouette and blue rim light are the style.
prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} premium dark consumer-tech launch poster in an electric-blue silhouette style. Feature {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP} staged in {LOCATION}. Add {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Preserve these style anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Avoid this source content: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Composition: one centered brandless product silhouette, large black negative space, a glowing electric-blue horizontal platform, blue floor reflection beneath the object, giant cropped blue geometric sans-serif background typography reading "{MAIN_TEXT}" behind the product, clean white lower launch copy using "{SECONDARY_TEXT}", and a tiny minimal accent mark or status light "{ACCENT_SYMBOL}". Lighting: low-key black stage, cyan-blue rim light, glossy edge highlights, soft bloom, haze, deep shadows, no warm accents. Typography: sparse, premium, clean geometric sans-serif, no real logos. Wardrobe or human styling if present: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Keep the layout minimal, symmetrical, cinematic, and teaser-like rather than dense or feature-heavy.
negative_prompt: No Redmi, no AirDots, no Pro wordmark, no wireless earbuds, no earbud charging case, no real brand logos, no copied product silhouette, no copied Chinese headline, no copied date or launch wording, no top-right brand mark, no platform UI, no carousel arrows, no page counter, no social app dots, no watermark, no QR code, no username, no price sticker, no feature cards, no warm badges, no orange or gold accent system, no bright catalog lighting, no lifestyle background, no flat vector art, no comic illustration, no dense multi-object scene, no cluttered HUD interface.

values.SUBJECT: a brandless smart ring in a small vertical charging dock
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: standing upright like a quiet wearable-tech hero
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a slim circular smart ring held by a narrow matte pedestal, not a rounded earbud case
values.LOCATION: a black void studio with a luminous blue tabletop
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: a giant cropped blue word, faint blue haze, and a smooth reflective foreground
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: no visible human body or wardrobe
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: black negative space, central product silhouette, electric-blue rim light, glowing horizontal platform, blue reflection, giant cropped blue type, clean white lower copy, minimal premium launch mood
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no Redmi, no AirDots, no Pro, no wireless earbuds, no charging case, no Chinese source headline, no carousel UI, no watermark

values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a thin rounded rectangular handheld translator with a dark glass front and subtle side button
values.LOCATION: a black launch stage with blue light rising from the floor
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: oversized cropped blue typography, soft navy haze, and a faint mirror reflection
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: Pocket Voice Link / global listening mode
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: no person, no hands, pure product stage
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: large empty black field, centered dark product, electric-blue edge glow, blue platform line, soft reflection, huge background word, lower white sans-serif announcement text
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no Redmi, no AirDots, no Pro, no earbuds, no earbud case, no original Chinese text, no app arrows, no brand logo

values.SUBJECT_ACTION: resting as a dark cube-like silhouette with its lens barely catching blue light
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a small rounded projector cube with one circular lens and a flat top
values.LOCATION: a minimal black product theater with a bright blue horizon line
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: deep blue oversized cropped lettering, a low fog glow, and a subtle floor reflection
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: Portable Cinema Core / quiet night preview
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: minimal black stage, centered product silhouette, cool blue rim light, glowing platform, reflective blue foreground, giant cropped blue text, sparse white launch copy
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no Redmi, no AirDots, no Pro, no wireless audio case, no exact source copy, no top-right brand, no carousel overlay

values.SUBJECT: a brandless foldable desk lamp
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning forward as a sculptural silhouette over the blue stage
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a compact hinged lamp with a thin vertical stem and small rounded light bar
values.LOCATION: a black studio tabletop lit only by electric-blue glow
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: a giant soft blue word cropped behind the lamp, blue haze, and a calm glossy reflection

values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: black negative space, one centered product silhouette, electric-blue rim lighting, horizontal glowing platform, reflection, giant cropped blue typography, clean white lower product text
